full_text:
Gu Rong (Yanxian) 顧榮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Rong (顧榮), styledYanxian, was born in Wu. A clever youth and fair in punishment. Tended to avoid disorder either by drinking or fleeing. Gu Rong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Gu Rong lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
